description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a matte black finish and a large, high-resolution display. The screen is open and shows a web browser with multiple images and text, indicating the device is powered on and in use. The keyboard is full-sized with a QWERTY layout, featuring a prominent touchpad and a red pointing stick in the center, characteristic of certain business laptops. The chassis appears to be constructed from a combination of metal and plastic, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight feel. Several ports are visible along the sides, including USB and possibly HDMI, suitable for urban work environments. The overall design is sleek and professional, ideal for use in offices, cafes, or public spaces.
description: A sleek, black laptop with a large display, full keyboard, and visible ports, powered on and displaying a web browser. The design is modern and professional, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Left-side view showing the open screen, keyboard, and visible side ports.
description_view_1: Rear view showing the back edge of the laptop lid, with no screen or keyboard visible.
description_view_2: Right-side view highlighting the open screen, keyboard, and additional side ports.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full keyboard, touchpad, and the active screen with web content.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and powered on, displaying a web browser with images and text.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with function row and red pointing stick; no numeric keypad visible.
